messages.body: Hey Rachael, How have you been?  I’m truly sorry for the frustration you’ve experienced and for the long wait around the cancellation. I completely understand your concerns. As the Senior Growth Strategist, I want to con…

I’ve also shared a detailed performance report summarising everything we’ve worked on so far. I hope it’s helpful and gives you some clarity or insights as you continue your marketing efforts, whether on your own or with…
If you ever choose to revisit this or need support down the line, the door is always open. I truly wish you the best moving forward.

Great, where are we at with this?

There has been a shift in our current business needs. Most of the leads we’ve received have been unresponsive, and with recent changes in our internal team structure, I’m no longer responsible for filling employee books.…

Hi Rachael!  Can we connect over a call instead ?

Hi Rachel,  It was great speaking with you :)  As we discussed, we’re happy to give you a one-time waiver for the December payment. Starting in January, your subscription will be $149.
So sorry. Its making me update the google meet app
Hello,  I’m waiting in the meeting room. Would you be joining?
Also, please start working on your reviews and do me some offers that we can run for December. I’ll be waiting :)
Yeah anytime works
